experience_chunks.description: Brand design and creative direction at a consumer-products company at Infosys.

Business analyst at a consulting firm, working primarily with retail and CPG clients. Conducted business diagnostics, process re-engineering work, and digital transformation strategy projects.

Developed React-based admin interfaces and Node.js REST API for a SaaS company. Worked on full-stack web application development, including frontend components, REST endpoint design, and PostgreSQL schema.
Owned AWS account architecture, Terraform modules, and Kubernetes cluster operations for an enterprise SaaS company. Designed CI/CD pipelines and monitoring stack.

Developed full-stack web applications using React, Node.js, and GraphQL. Worked on conventional backend engineering — APIs, databases, queues, deployments. Contributed to ML-adjacent projects at a self-learner level.
Performed QA engineering and test automation using Selenium and pytest. Worked on shifting test responsibility into the dev team.
